This affordable and reliable piece of hardware has proven itself in nearly any terrain or situation. Desert, jungle, snow, and dungeon were all accounted for in its timeless design. It can even fire underwater.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: AK-47 (Island Forme) If the player has Orange, pressing reload with a full magazine toggles Island Forme. Island Forme AK-47 fires oranges, which deal more damage than regular AK-47 shots. Each orange deals 7 damage. If the Orange is eaten while the AK-47 is in Island Forme, it will remain in Island Forme, but if the player switches away from Island Forme, they will not be able to switch back. It can be reloaded by any means except manual reload. Such as firing when empty.; Regular Old Guns If the player also has Regular Shotgun, both guns fire four times as fast, but their damage is decreased by 25%.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The AK-47 is wielded by some Bullet Kin, Tankers, and Hollowpoints.; If the player feeds the AK-47 and either the Flame Hand or Megahand to a regular Muncher, it will always spit out a Machine Fist.

entries.unlock: Find the secret room in the tutorial.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A sturdy, if modest, helmet. Once worn by a knight with an unusually large head.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants two pieces of Armor.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Pea Cannon If the player also has Pea Shooter, its appearance changes, damage is increased and its shots cause small explosions.; Tutorialized If the player also has Old Knight's Shield, it will orbit the player and block bullets.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is obtained in a secret room in the Hall of Knowledge. To find it, go to the room on the left of the first room after Manuel leaves the player. Using a blank will open the secret room, where the Old Knight's Helm and the Old Knight's Shield can be found.; Talking to Ser Manuel with Old Knight's Helm and Old Knight's Shield after defeating him unlocks the Blockner fight.

entries.unlock: Create 10 guns using the green Muncher, or create a Cold 45 using the Muncher recipe.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Freezes enemies. This gun's manufacture was outsourced, and due to a typographical error turned out better than expected.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Cold 1896 If the player has the Colt 1851, both guns' magazine sizes are doubled, and the guns are dual-wielded.; Ice Accumulation If the player has Snowballets, Cold 45's shot size is greatly increased, and the amount of damage it gains from Snowballets is increased.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Its name is a reference to the term "Colt 45" (which is likely the "typographical error" that the Ammonomicon Entry refers to). The "Colt 45" is a nickname for the Single Action Army or M1911 handguns, as both are.45 caliber handguns manufactured by Colt. It is also the name of a malt liquor beverage commonly sold in a 40 oz. bottle.; "Shatterday Night Special" is a reference to the term "Saturday Night Special", a nickname for a cheap, easily disposable handgun normally purchased in a hasty decision to commit a crime or suicide.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Erases all enemy projectiles in the room. Pushes enemies back, and deals a small amount of damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Blanks have a unique icon on the map, showing up as; It is never explained how Blanks function in-universe, with various dialogues and ammonomicon entries suggesting they emit a sonic frequency"Forever seeking revenge, these creatures emit shrieks that match the frequency of Blanks- negating Gungeoneer projectiles." - Ammonomicon Entry of the Bombshee, while others state that they send bullets to another plane of existence."When you use a Blank, all Bullets on the screen will be sent to another plane of existence. Erased." - Ser Manuel There are also some hints that blanks may be psychological in nature, clearing enemy bullets from the players mind"Press the Blank Button to clear your mind of Enemy Bullets!" - The Pamphlet.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Alternates between frigid blasts and explosive slugs. The Ice Breaker was designed by Edwin, the legendary gunsmith. The only gun to combine freezing and shattering technology into one convenient package!
entries.englishEffectHighlights: The first two shots of each magazine fire a shotgun blast of freezing ice bullets.; The final shot of each magazine fires a single large, metal slug that can pierce up to 5 times.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Gunderlord If the player also has Patriot, Ice Breaker fires single high-velocity shots and slowly regenerates ammo over time. Patriot shots become connected with electricity.; Ice Accumulation If the player has Snowballets, Ice Breaker's shot size is greatly increased, and the amount of damage it gains from Snowballets is increased.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Because the ice shots of the Ice Breaker use the Ice damage type, they deal 1.5x damage to Muzzle Wisps and Muzzle Flares, and do not ignite Coalers. Additionally, these bullets will freeze any water they pass over.; Despite the Ammonomicon entry suggesting otherwise, the metal slugs fired by this gun do not deal any more damage to frozen enemies.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A rudimentary wooden hand crossbow. Used commonly by Skullets in the Hollow.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun is used by Skullets, Skullmets, and Knight Bullet Kin.; Due to the way enemy AI is coded in Enter the Gungeon, companions and enemies which use weapons disconnected from their sprite hold real guns which are theoretically usable in the players inventory, albeit unobtainable. This may explain why the Wristbow is absent from all loot pools, despite being fully functional.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: An initial burst of exotic particles triggers additional homing blasts. A weapon from the future. Perhaps a Gungeoneer from the distant future succeeded, and brought this gun back? Gunesis 1:1 In the beginning, the Gungeon was formless and void, and bullets moved over the face of the deep.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Particle Accelerator If the player also has Laser Sight, whenever a smaller bullet hits an enemy or object, a laser is automatically fired in its direction.; Upon splitting, the large bullet creates a visual blast effect that is similar to a blank but doesn't have any actual effect.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 3 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: An advanced issue rifle for Hegemony troops. Primarily wielded by elite human soldiers, as the Hegemony combat robots have superior weaponry.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Decorated The Hegemony Carbine fires three bullets in a tight spread.; Ruby Carbine, Cog of Battle, or Mimic Tooth Necklace The Hegemony Carbine changes forms, and fires red bolts that bounce once and fire enemies.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The tagline "All The Same" is possibly a reference to the Rifleman's Creed.; This gun is used in The Marine's past.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires two wave projectiles. Inspired by real science, the Helix is extremely useful for hitting two things at once, as long as they are a certain distance apart.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Double Double Helix If the player also has Helix Bullets, instead of the Helix Bullets effect being applied to each bullet, Helix's projectiles will be doubled (2 bullets will fire on each side while following the original pattern), damage is increased by 25%, and shot speed is increased by 50%.; The Helix is a surprisingly powerful weapon, though difficult to use against regular enemies due to the way it fires. The Helix is best used against large enemies or bosses to maximize accuracy and damage.

entries.unlock: Kill the [[Bosses#The Past
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increased clip capacity with damage taken. The Gilded Hydra is a masterwork shotgun created by Edwin, the legendary gunsmith. Its capacity grows every time its bearer is wounded. Revolvations 2:1 These are the words of Kaliber, she who grips the seven sidearms in her hands and walks among the six loaded chambers. When the Gun is drawn to the heart of the pacifist, and when the chambers are empty and the shells are spent, the Last of the Jammed will ascend to seal the Breach forever.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Ecstasy of Gold If the player also has Gilded Bullets, Gilded Hydra's damage is increased by 25%.; The Gilded Hydra is part of the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 25 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Companion. Fires upon foes. This tiny ship is captained by a heroic, tiny spacefarer. Perhaps he or she has a tiny past full of tiny regrets?
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Follows the player and fires lasers at enemies which deal 5 damage.; Blocks enemy bullets.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: RAIDEN The maximum ammo of the Raiden Coil is increased by 25%. The Raiden Coil fires pairs of bullets alongside its laser, and its ammo consumption is significantly reduced.; Space Best Friend Space friend turns blue, and fire its lasers at a much faster rate.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Lasers fired by the Space Friend can be caught by Gunjurers.; The Space Friend is a reference to the arcade shoot-em-up series Raiden. The default appearance of the companion is based off the red Player 1 ship from Raiden (1990), while the Space Best Friend synergy is based off the blue Player 2 ship from the same game.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Detonates explosive objects in the current room. Kids these days can detonate explosives from their phones. In the early days of the Gungeon, some form of shooting was required.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Detonates all explosives, explosive enemies, and exploding enemy bullets currently present in the room.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: AI Assistant If the player has Roll Bomb, roll bombs will bounce around instead of detonating immediately, and can be manually detonated with the iBomb Companion App.; Shot Across The Bow If the player has Gunbow, it fires explosive missiles.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Enemies detonated include:; Bombshee

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Briefly stops time. This bell appears to be made of different materials at different times. The mournful tones it emits echo forwards and backwards. Some claim that they can hear it before it rings.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Get Equipped With -F- Enables Time Stopper mode on the Megahand, which makes its charged shots stop time for 1 second and deal 10 damage to all enemies onscreen. In this mode, the Megahand takes 1.5s to charge, and consumes 5 ammo when firing a charged shot. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.; Holy Bell If the player has Trident, killing an enemy with the Trident creates a large circular area that slows time.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Using the Aged Bell is one simple strategy for unlocking Shelleton Key. Because the Aged Bell is a high tier item, it is more likely to be acquired from Rainbow Chests in Rainbow Mode. This makes it a stealing item that is easy to acquire by quick-restarting over and over again until it appears in the first chest in Rainbow Mode.; This item may be a reference to the Unheard Bell from the manga series Made In Abyss, which is also a magical bell which stops time.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 10 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Combines the currently equipped gun with the next carried gun. It isn't pretty, but sometimes wondrous things can be accomplished with a roll of tape. Just look at the Bundle of Wands, or the Magitek Hybrid!
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When used on two different guns sequentially, they will be taped together and combined. The first gun the item is used on will be consumed, while the second will gain the following effects;; Additional projectiles, taken from the consumed gun, fired alongside the host gun's base projectiles. These additional projectiles have their own separate magazine and consume additional ammo from the host gun.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Combined guns still only count as one gun when fed to a Muncher.; Duct Tape may be a reference to the movie Aliens, In which the protagonist Ripley tapes together an AR and flamethrower near the end of the film while preparing for a rescue.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Adds aim assist, of a sort. Everybody needs a little help, sometimes. With this crutch, every bullet fired will try really hard to hit a target, even if aimed incorrectly.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: All bullets fired by the player slightly label=home in towards enemies.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Smart Bombs If the player also has Bomb or Ice Bomb, bombs home in on enemies.; Pea Cannon if the player also has Pea Shooter, its damage is increased and shots cause small explosions.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The homing of this item appears to stack with guns whose projectiles already home, allowing them to turn faster towards their targets.; Similarly, if duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, bullets home in on enemies more strongly, turning faster to reach their target.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: More bullets, less damage.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Guns fire triple the projectiles, with each projectile dealing 55% of its original damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Dumb Smart Bullets If the player also has Homing Bullets, bullets that don't home in become larger and deal 50% more damage.; Laser Light Show If the player also has Laser Rifle, Laser Rifle becomes blue and gold, and fires 3 sets of 3 shots in a spread per trigger pull. Each shot bounces once.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 18 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: The pinnacle of Gungeon air support.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Sets a large rectangular area on fire, igniting and damaging enemies.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Napalm B If the player has Mega Douser, the water of the Mega Douser becomes flammable, and can spread fire from all sources including the Napalm Strike.; Phoenix Up If the player has Phoenix, while Phoenix is held, summons a phoenix companion that fires at enemies.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Altered: Napalm B This synergy used to only let Mega Douser spread Napalm Strike's fire. It can now spread all fire.; The category "Smells Great!" in the Ammonomicon is a reference to a quote from the movie Apocalypse Now, "I love the smell of napalm in the morning."

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Each note has an unlock condition that must be met before they can appear:; First note: Beat Gungeon Proper.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Each note has an unlock condition that must be met before they can appear:; First note: Beat Gungeon Proper.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Each note has an unlock condition that must be met before they can appear:; First note: Beat Gungeon Proper.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Each note has an unlock condition that must be met before they can appear:; First note: Beat Gungeon Proper.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Each note has an unlock condition that must be met before they can appear:; First note: Beat Gungeon Proper.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Has six variants, each of which reveals one of the directions necessary to make it through the maze in the Resourceful Rat's Lair. The cheese icon at the end of each notes Ammonomicon entry points in a cardinal direction, indicating the order of room exits the player must take.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Each note has an unlock condition that must be met before they can appear:; First note: Beat Gungeon Proper.

entries.unlock: Win 10 of the Gunsling King's wagers and talk to him in The Breach.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Companion. Occasionally blanks enemy bullets. This fearless owl follows you, clutching a wad of Blanks in its talons.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Summons an owl companion that flies close behind the player, blocking enemy bullets.; Has a chance to activate a miniature Blank effect when enemy bullets come near the player.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Don't Hoot the Messenger If the player also has Dungeon Eagle, halves time required to fire a charged shot with the Dungeon Eagle.; Special Delivery If the player has Bundle of Wands, Witch Pistol, Hexagun, or Staff of Firepower, the gun's and Owl's shots bounce, and Owl turns skeletal and fires letters at enemies.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The owl's blanks will not open Secret Rooms.; Owl's bullets are affected by all bullet modifiers.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A quick way to get around, or to bring an item to you. Can briefly stun some enemies! This is a kind of grappling hook that can be shot. Known to some as the Shoothook.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Allows players to hook onto and then pull themselves towards walls at a fast speed.; The hook has unlimited range.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Black Flag If the player also has Corsair, each Corsair shot will periodically fire two bouncing cannonballs perpendicular to itself as it travels.; Raizo's Stuff If the player also has Bloodied Scarf, bullets shot while being pulled with the grappling hook gain homing.
entries.englishUsageNotes: If the player cannot reach the hook's location (e.g. table blocking the way), the hook will automatically deactivate after a few seconds.; The Grappling Hook can be used to cheat in Winchester's Games.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Used for Winchester's games. Does no damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: If the player leaves the shooting range mid-game, the Prize Pistol will be removed from their inventory and they will not receive a reward.; Although the max ammo of the Prize Pistol is 1, Winchester loads four shots into the gun before the minigame begins, resulting in normally inaccessible ammo values of 4/1, 3/1, and 2/1.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Triggers a chain of missile strikes. Only the most daring pilots will fly low enough to enter the Gungeon.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Calls down a series of explosions over a long rectangular area. Each explosion deals 25 damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Air Support If the player has Explosive Rounds, Air Strike will cover a massive area.; Shot Across The Bow If the player has Gunbow, it fires explosive missiles.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Deals damage to nearby enemies. This pepper is hot enough to damage unassuming bystanders.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Continuously deals damage to nearby enemies at a rate of 5 damage per second.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Maximize Spell If the player has Flame Hand, it turns green, and green flames will leave pools of green fire upon hitting enemies. Green fire does not damage or burn the player, and sets enemies permanently on fire.; Sausage and Pepper If the player has Meatbun, Gungeon Pepper's range will be doubled. The synergy is lost when Meatbun is consumed.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases the chance of finding chests. This ring was first given to Winchester, largely due to a naming mix-up. With little use for treasure, Winchester eventually gave it away as a prize in one of his strange games.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases the chance of finding rewards upon clearing rooms.; Increases the chance of finding a chest upon clearing a room by 50%.Float ChestIncrementMultiplier in class AmazingChestAheadItemMethod InformRoomCleared in class Dungeon
entries.englishUsageNotes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, they will not stack their effects.

entries.unlock: Complete the Forge 10 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Greatly increased ammo capacity. This simple bandana, which once covered the brow of an ancient hero, still remembers the old ways. Its powers have weakened over the years, but should still suffice to provide you with near-infinite ammunition.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Quadruples maximum ammo.
entries.englishUsageNotes: I need scissors! 61! If the player also has Trank Gun, Trank Gun changes appearance, its rate of fire is decreased, damage and reload time are increased, and its bullets will inflict slow and stun.; What A Thrill If the player also has Patriot, it has a chance to transmogrify enemies into snakes.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Allows a Gungeoneer to keep their footing, even when great force is applied to them.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Prevents the players movement from being interfered with by external forces, such as knockback from enemies, gun recoil, conveyor belts, and patches of ice. The player will still be moved around by moving platforms.; Causes the player to release a shockwave upon landing. Enemies caught in the shockwave will be knocked back and take light damage.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hardwood If the player also has Mahoguny, it fires four explosive shots at a time.; Heavy Metal If the player also has Anvillain, its shot speed is decreased by 25% and its damage is increased by 20%.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item can be very useful on elevators with holes. Knocking grounded enemies into pits will instantly kill them, which is easy to do with this item.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 25 HC
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Broccoli is an edible green plant in the cabbage family whose large flowerhead is eaten as a vegetable.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage by 10%.; Adds a 10% chance to negate damage.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hardwood If the player has Mahoguny, the gun fires four explosive pinecones at a time.; Cactus Flower / Vegetables If the player has Cactus, it has a chance to fire a prickly pear that bounces off walls and fires needles in all directions. In addition, all needles deal triple damage, are doubled in size, pierce, and bounce.
entries.englishUsageNotes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases damage, the chance to negate damage, and movement speed.; Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Broccoli was an S item, did not increase speed, and only gave a 5% damage increase.

entries.unlock: Retrieve Salt for [[NPCs
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Chance to improve healing received. An experimental treatment administered by the Gungeon's medical unit.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds a 50% chance to heal the player for an extra half a heart whenever they receive healing.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Antichamber If the player has Dark Marker, it alternates between firing red and blue shots that become very slow and large after traveling a short distance. If any red and blue shots touch, the blank effect is activated.; The Powerhouse of the Cell If the player has Evolver, it evolves to its next stage. If the Evolver is already at its final stage, nothing happens.
entries.englishUsageNotes: In the real world, antibodies are proteins produced by the immune system to assist in fighting infection.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Health increased. The Pink Guon stone is actually a White Guon stone that has been used as a component in blood rituals, infusing it with the hearts of fallen Gungeoneers.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants one extra heart container.; Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Pinker Guon Stone If the player has +1 Bullets, Amulet of the Pit Lord, or Charmed Bow, Pink Guon Stone becomes larger, rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay, and enemies that damage the player become temporarily charmed.; Tile Match If the player also has Tetrominator, whenever the player shoots, Pink Guon Stone will occasionally shoot a T Tetromino.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Has no effect on the health of The Robot.; The Guon Stones are a reference to Ioun Stones in Dungeons & Dragons.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increased Blank regeneration. The White Guon stone grants its bearer an additional Blank on every floor.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants an extra blank per floor.; Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Tile Match If the player also has Tetrominator, whenever the player shoots, White Guon Stone will occasionally shoot a yellow cube Tetromino itself.; Whiter Guon Stone If the player also has +1 Bullets, Amulet of the Pit Lord, or Flash Ray, the size of the Guon Stone is increased, it rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay, and the cooldown of Daruma is halved. However, the item does not synergize with Daruma.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Attacks enemies. In years past, the Orange Guon stone boosted its bearer's damage, but the Belligerite at the core of the stone has grown so enraged that the stone itself now lashes out at foes.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Shoots at enemies.; Each shot deals 5 damage.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Enter the Fruitgeon If the player has Orange, Orange Guon Stone deals 7 damage per shot and fires oranges along with a doubled firing rate.; While this synergy is usually lost upon consuming the orange, if the player is holding +1 Bullets or Amulet of the Pit Lord, the synergy will remain.
entries.englishUsageNotes: If the player has both the Enter the Fruitgeon and Oranger Guon Stone synergies at the same time, their damage increases do not stack. Instead, Enter the Fruitgeon overrides the damage upgrade of Oranger Guon Stone, and makes the stone deal 7 damage per shot.; This item benefits from the Y.V. shrine, for a chance to fire extra bullets.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Negates poison damage. The Clear Guon stone continuously cleanses the blood of its bearer of all impurities.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Negates poison damage.; Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Clearer Guon Stone If the player has +1 Bullets, Bottle, or Amulet of the Pit Lord, the Clear Guon Stone becomes bigger, rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay, and grants immunity to fire and electricity in addition of the poison immunity naturally granted. Additionally, shooting enemies while standing on fire/oil or ice/water will burn or freeze them, respectively.; Gungeonite If the player has Gamma Ray, the beam will leave a trail of poison.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Clear Guon Stone, like all the other guon stones, is based on Ioun Stones, popularized by Dungeons and Dragons.; The Clear Guon Stone resembles a Skullet.

entries.unlock: Defeat the High Dragun 5 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Provides healing, and replenishes on each floor. Once carried by powerful Gunknights, these flasks have dimmed with age. Some say they are linked directly to the power of the Gun.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Heals the player for one heart upon use.; Starts with 2 charges, and refills to 2 charges at the start of each floor.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: \o/ Killing an enemy with the Sunlight Javelin creates a fiery aura in a 5 tile radius around the point the enemy died. This aura lasts for 5 seconds, and sets enemies that enter it on fire.; Five O'Clock Somewhere If the player has Crestfaller, reloading it will fire a glass bottle that will stun enemies it hits. Reloading Crestfaller while standing on a liquid replenishes the ammo missing in the current magazine, similar to Gungine.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The player is immobile while the item is being used, and the player is not healed until the item is finished being used.; The player is still vulnerable to damage while healing, so it is not recommended for in-combat recovery.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves dodging. The Red Guon Stone is 40% Dodgicite, greatly improving dodge roll speed and distance.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases the speed and distance of dodge rolls.; Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Redder Guon Stone If the player also has +1 Bullets, Ring of Fire Resistance, or Amulet of the Pit Lord, the Guon Stone's size is increased, it rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay, and the player gains a yellow glow and stat increase similar to that of the Macho Brace for a short time whenever the Guon Stone blocks a bullet.; Tile Match If the player also has Tetrominator, whenever the player shoots, Red Guon Stone will occasionally shoot a Z Tetromino.
entries.englishUsageNotes: For the purposes of Really Special Lute, Red Guon Stone counts as a companion.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Slows time upon receiving damage. The Blue Guon Stone, or the Stone of Critical Perception, increases its bearers reaction times in dangerous situations.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon taking damage, decreases enemy shot speed by 33% for 5 seconds.; Orbits the player, blocking enemy shots on contact.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bluer Guon Stone If the player has +1 Bullets, Amulet of the Pit Lord, or Bullet Time, the size of the Guon Stone is increased, it rotates at a fixed distance from the player while they are moving instead of on a slight delay, and it rotates faster but orbits farther from the player. If the Guon Stone blocks a bullet, it deals 15 damage to all nearby enemies.; This synergy is very effective against bosses, due to the large sprays of bullets most bosses fire.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Since the Farewell to Arms update, the Blue Guon Stone now rotates twice as fast compared to other Guon Stones, and therefore no longer affects the location of other Guon Stones that orbit around the player.; If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further decreases enemy's shot speed and adds another Blue Guon Stone to the player.

entries.unlock: Defeat the Lich.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A relic of the first hero to master the Gungeon, whose skill attracted the envy of Kaliber herself. Bestows unreasonable courage in the face of danger, and the luck to survive it.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a heart container.; Fully heals the player.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Liches Get Stitches If the player has Lichy Trigger Finger, killing an enemy grants a temporary fire rate boost, signified by a green arrow above the player's head like those above enemies buffed by a Gunsinger.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Dropping and picking up the item will not heal the player again.; The chance to negate damage applies to falling damage from walking into pits.

entries.unlock: Defeat the boss of the Gungeon Proper without getting hit.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A payment for services rendered. This mysterious coin vanishes when tossed into the air.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, kills all enemies in a random unexplored room of the current floor.; Where the effect took place, a note can be found lying in a pool of blood on the ground.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The player can get money from enemies killed in this way, but pickup drops will likely be stolen by the Rat before the player reaches the room.; Chests will spawn normally after clearing rooms with this item.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases accuracy. Laser sights work extremely well in the Gungeon, where stealth is rarely a concern.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Reduces weapon spread by 50%, increasing accuracy.; Adds a laser sight that points where the player is aiming.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Future Gangster If the player has Thompson Sub-Machinegun, it fires lasers and increases damage by 1.; Particle Accelerator If the player has Particulator, whenever a split Particulator shot dissipates, a laser is automatically fired in its direction.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires two projectiles. If they meet... Matter is composed largely of strong particles, and antimatter is composed of weak particles. When they meet, the strong particles overwhelm the weak particles and then explode in satisfaction. This gun is the favorite gun of the Gunsling King, who somewhat inscrutably says it reminds him of his servant.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When uncharged, fires black and white projectiles with no special properties. This projectile is fired on button-down rather than button-up (unlike the uncharged shots of other charged weapons), meaning that one will automatically be fired as the player begins charging a charged shot.; When charged, fires two capsules (one matter, one antimatter) in a helical formation, arcing towards one another.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Antichamber If the player has Antibody, Dark Marker's uncharged shots alternate between firing matter and antimatter capsules without consuming any additional ammo. The shots travel straight and become slow-moving orbs after a short period of time, which can deal multiple instances of damage. If any red and blue shots/orbs touch, the explosion and blank effect is activated. The charged shot remains unchanged, and will still consume 10 ammo.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This gun does not anger Bello when fired in the shop unless it is charged.; Despite being listed as a semiautomatic weapon in the Ammonomicon, the Dark Marker is one of the few guns in Enter the Gungeon to have multiple different shooting styles at once. The uncharged shots of the weapon are internally semiautomatic, while its charged shots are charge type.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Sets targets aflame! Unfortunately, deep in the Gungeon, no one will see this flare but you.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Emergency Help If the player also has Medkit, reload time is decreased by 66%, damage is increased by 50%, and random enemies will periodically have explosions erupt around them, damaging them and hurting other enemies around them in a short distance. This explosion can also do damage to the player.; Firing With Flair If the player also has Amulet of the Pit Lord, Master of Unlocking, Copper Ammolet, or Springheel Boots, the Flare Gun turns green and is guaranteed to inflict enemies with greenfire, which has a massively increased duration.
entries.englishUsageNotes: After hitting a wall, fired flares will continue burning for a time. These lingering flares produce light, but have no combat utility.; The Synergy with Medkit may be a reference to how flare guns and medical supplies are often kept together for emergency situations.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 7 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increases combat prowess, with absolutely no downside! A potent gun-enhancing drug from the far reaches of the galaxy. It is known to be extremely addictive, and extremely expensive.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: If Spice has been used, it has a chance to replace future item drops depending on how many times it has been used.; The effects of spice change depending on how many times it has been used.
entries.englishUsageNotes: In co-op mode, effects of spice usage are counted separately for each player. The sole exception is the increased spice wieght, which is based on the combined number of times both players have used Spice. (For example, if both players have used Spice twice, Spice will have a 80% chance to replace future items, the same as if one player had used it four times).; Bug: Dying in co-op mode removes any stat modifiers that the dead player gained through spice. These stats are not returned on being resurrected. The number of times spice has been used is not reset.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Makes bullets larger and more effective. The effectiveness of a bullet is directly related to its size with zero exceptions.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Doubles bullet size.; Increases damage by 30%.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Iron Slug If the player also has Big Iron, it fires a single high-damage slug.; Massive Effect If the player also has Mass Shotgun, its shot size is significantly increased.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The increased projectile size negatively affects guns with large projectiles such as the Crestfaller. Often times, while close to a wall, the edge of a projectile will be in the wall resulting in the projectile hitting the wall the moment it is fired.; The decrease in maximum ammo can be bypassed if you temporarily drop the item before picking up ammo drops or new guns. This is because the game lets you hold more than your maximum ammo.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: All bullets can freeze enemies. This bullet upgrade attaches small condensers to each bullet fired, lowering their temperature substantially. Accidentally invented by the Gungeon Acquisitions team when Cadence told Ox to "Cool it with all the bullets."
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds a chance to fire light-blue bullets that freeze enemies.; The chance is higher for weapons with slower rates of fire.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Added Effect - Ice If the player has Alpha Bullet, the first shot of each magazine is guaranteed to be an ice bullet.; Arctic Warfare If the player has A.W.P., it turns orange and white, deals 62.5% more damage, and its shots are guaranteed to freeze enemies.

entries.unlock: Collect five Master Rounds in one run.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Time moves as you do. This watch is extremely hot to the touch.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Slows down time depending on how slow the player is moving. When standing completely still, time is slowed by 99%.; One second of normal time takes 1 minute and 40 seconds of standing still with the Super Hot Watch.
entries.englishUsageNotes: While time is slowed, gun cooldowns are also slowed, making firing difficult. However, the player may still cycle through their gun inventory, allowing them to fire every gun once before resuming the flow of time for high damage.; The five Master Rounds required to unlock the Super Hot Watch do not have to be unique. As such, duplicate Master Rounds acquired via Clone will still count towards the unlock.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Increased magazine capacity for all guns.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases the magazine size of all weapons by 50%.; Does not affect guns with only one round in each magazine, as numbers are rounded down.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Alternative Rock If the player has Face Melter, instead of firing four streams, Face Melter fires two parallel columns of notes. Reloading fires a guitar pick with a chance to stun.; Dr Worm If the player has Heck Blaster, its ammo automatically replenishes slowly.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Drum Clip can negatively affect weapons that have special effects on the final shot, such as Eye of the Beholster.; If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, further increases guns' magazine size. Doesn't affect guns with one round.

entries.unlock: Defeat the Lich.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reveals every room on every floor. The greatest and final work by the great cartographer Woban. Infuriated by the Gungeon's adaptation to his previous work, Woban dedicated his life to the art of cartography. Nearing his death, he returned to the Gungeon to create a final artifact: the Gungeon blueprint.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fully maps out every subsequent floor.; Reveals all secret rooms.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Does not reveal the trapdoor leading to the Resourceful Rat's Lair.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: First invented by the Grey Mauser to cheat at one of Winchester's games. Though Winchester eventually caught on and rebuilt his targets to appear friendly, these bullets are still exceptionally useful.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Bullets have a 20% chance to label=home in on enemies.; The chance for any given projectile home in is multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the player's current gun. This means that faster firing guns trigger the effect less often, while slower firing guns are more likely to be effected.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Dumb Smart Bullets If the player has Scattershot, shots unaffected by Homing Bullets become larger and deal 50% more damage.; Smart Bombs If the player also has Bomb or Ice Bomb, they will home in on targets and blow up slower.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item grants stronger homing than Crutch, but does not apply to all bullets.

entries.unlock: Reach the Abbey of the True Gun.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This sinister brooch was once worn by an unlucky inhabitant of the Gungeon, who used it to draw health from wounded enemies. There is a curse upon it, however, and the cost may not be worth the benefit.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases by 1 while held.; Heals half a heart every 1200 damage dealt to enemies.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: blade If the player also has Kruller Glaive, its damage is increased by 20%, and enemies hit will visually bleed.; Fear the Old Blood If the player also has Trick Gun, its reload time is decreased by 33% and fire rate is increased by 20%.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item has no effect aside from increasing curse when playing as Robot.; The item effect is reminiscent of the rally mechanic in Bloodborne, whereby the player character can regain health by attacking enemies after taking damage.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Masterwork bullets. Peer-reviewed studies have shown that these bullets are precisely 1 better than normal bullets.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases damage by 25%.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bluer Guon Stone If the player also has Blue Guon Stone, the rotation speed of the Guon Stone is increased. If the Guon Stone blocks a bullet, it deals 15 damage to all nearby enemies.; Clearer Guon Stone If the player also has Clear Guon Stone, it grants immunity to poison, fire, and electricity. Shooting enemies while standing on fire or ice will burn or freeze them, respectively.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to common magical items in Dungeons and Dragons, which often show their enhanced nature by being labelled as '+1'. For instance, a '+1 Sword' deals 1 additional damage and has 1 higher chance to hit on attack rolls.; +1 Bullets synergising with Guon Stones is due to +1 Bullets and every Guon Stone being a reference to Dungeons and Dragons. Guon Stones themselves are a reference to Ioun Stones.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires backward. Another incredible use of tape in the Gungeon, this backward-facing gun has been charmed to fire in solidarity with any equipped gun.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Guns simultaneously shoot forwards and backwards. The backwards firing shots will be significantly less accurate.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Gruber's Bane If player also has Shadow Bullets all backward shots have an additional projectile.; Like Shooting Fish If the player has Barrel, a fish pops out of the Barrel and fires bullets. The last shot of each magazine fires fish who flop around on the ground and fire at enemies.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: All bullets gain ricochet. A talented gunslinger can bounce bullets with certain guns, but this special ammunition makes it easy to do with any weapon.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Allows the player's bullets to bounce off of objects twice.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Absent Minded If the player also has The Membrane, its shots bounce 4 times and become homing.; Bouncy Bullets will also cause tables from Table Tech Rocket to bounce.

entries.unlock: Ace three of [[Winchester (NPC)
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Several times rarer than a four-leaf clover, this seven-leafed charm bestows incredible luck upon its bearer.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases the quality of chests found in chest rooms, mirror rooms, and some secret rooms to a 50-50 chance of red or black.; Overrides the usual chance for Magnificence to decrease the quality of chests found in chest rooms.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Breakfast Club If the player also has Wind Up Gun, its reload time is halved, fire rate increased by 60%, damage increased by 50%, magazine size increased to 27, and all but the last 10 shots of each magazine will be stronger piercing lasers.; This item cannot drop from a Rainbow Mode chest

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 10 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Slows down time during explosions. Increases dodge power during explosions. These sunglasses belonged to an extremely cool Gungeoneer. He put them on very slowly. Some say he is still putting them on.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Slows down time by 55%See float timeScaleMultiplier in class SunglassesItem. Note that the value set in the source code (0.25) is not the value set in the actual prefab (0.75) and increases dodge roll distance and speed by 25%Methods GetModifiedTime and GetModifiedDistance in class DodgeRollStats for 2 seconds after an explosion.; This effect has a 10 second cooldown, meaning it cannot be permanently activated by chained explosives.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Kung Fu Hippie, Rappin' Surfer If the player also has Rad Gun, its magazine size is increased to 20 and its reload time is increased, giving more time to hit the mark. Grants 1.33 coolness. Additionally, the green skateboard of the gun will turn purple and the red hat will turn around so the bill is backwards.; Nailed It If the player also has the Nail Gun, it fires larger nails that do about 6 damage each and cause bleeding.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to the unflinching walk, a movie cliché popularized by action flicks where a "cool" character (sometimes wearing sunglasses) walks in slow motion as explosions go off behind them. Online, this is a more commonly known as the "cool guys don't look at explosions" meme, popularized by a song by comedy music group The Lonely Island.; In terms of design, the sunglasses closely resemble those of Horatio Caine, the protagonist of CSI: Miami who is well known for slowly putting on similar shades when announcing a one-liner based on the episode's plot.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Heals for a small amount. Increases damage dealt until injured. A delicious, freshly baked roll! Sometimes, things just work out.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Heals the player for one heart.; Grants double damage until the player is hit.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Sausage and Pepper If the player also has Gungeon Pepper, its range will be increased. The Meatbun will also heal five hearts rather than just one. The synergy is lost when Meatbun is consumed.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The damage effect is lost if either player is hit in Co-op.; This effect stacks with itself, meaning that a second meatbun will grant 4x damage, and 3 will grant 8x.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Launches Molotovs. The Molotov Launcher takes the principle of incendiary bottles and removes arm pain.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Special Reserve If the player has Hot Lead, Napalm Strike, or Double Vision, Molotovs create pools of green napalm. Green napalm does not damage the player, and inflicts greenfire on enemies, which has a massively increased duration.; The green flame from the synergy Special Reserve will not activate Sprun, even if being lit on fire is the activation trigger.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Unlike the regular Molotov, the Molotov Launcher will work in The Gorgun's arena.; Child projectiles created by Flak Bullets will not create puddles of fire.

entries.unlock: Reward from [[Frifle_and_the_Grey_Mauser#List_of_Quests
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Unlocks all chests! A necklace made from the tooth of a Mimic. Feels lucky!
entries.englishEffectHighlights: All chests (with the exception of Rat chests, and chests that have no corresponding mimic type) are unlocked, and become Mimics.; This includes chests spawned before the necklace was picked up.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Ruby Carbine The Hegemony Carbine changes forms, and fires red bolts that bounce once and fire enemies.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Has no interaction with Wall Mimics, Door Lord, or the Mimic Gun, despite them being mimics.; This item makes Junk significantly more difficult to acquire, as it is acquired from breaking non-mimic chests.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Makes chests safer. Not actually a ring, but rather a small creature pretending to be a ring. Emits a strange psychic tone only recognizable to mimics, preventing them from attacking.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Mimic chests will no longer attack the player, acting like regular chests.; Prevents Pedestal Mimics from appearing.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is most valuable to new and inexperienced players, to whom Mimics may pose a serious threat. For players experienced in fighting mimics, however, this item may even be considered negative as it prevents the player from obtaining free mimic loot.; Does not prevent Door Lord from appearing, despite it technically being a Mimic.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 5 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: All bullets have a chance to ignite foes. Freshly formed shells, straight from the Gungeon's Forge. The metal slug at the center of each round is still molten.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Every bullet fired has a 20%† chance to set enemies on fire. Projectiles given this effect are tinted red.; † The chance for any given projectile transmogrify in is multiplied by the effect chance scalar of the player's current gun. This means that faster firing guns trigger the effect less often, while slower firing guns are more likely to be effected.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Added Effect - Fire If the player also has the Alpha Bullets, the first bullet of a weapon's magazine is guaranteed to be a fire bullet.; Get Equipped With -H- Enables Atomic Fire mode on the Megahand, which fires piercing fireballs when uncharged that set everything in their path on fire. Modes can be switched by reloading the Megahand with a full magazine.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Get Equipped with -H-synergy is a reference to Mega Man II - the Atomic Fire weapon is gained from defeating Heat Man, and represented on the weapon select screen with an H

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 25 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Chain-fires homing rockets. A legendary weapon manufactured by Zilla Industries. This one was created bespoke for a powerful warrior, whose name has been lost to shadow.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Rapidly fires tightly 220 rockets that create small explosions upon hitting an enemy.; The damage dealt by these rockets (both their impact damage and explosive damage) bypass the Boss DPS cap, allowing this gun to kill bosses extremely quickly.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hail To The King If the player also has Oiled Cylinder, Yari Launcher's magazine size is increased by 50% and its damage is increased by 20%.; Shadow Warrior If the player also has Zilla Shotgun, when either gun is held, the player gains an orbiting Demon Head that fires on empty magazine reload. Reduces the guns' spread by 60%, increasing their accuracy.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The gun is a reference to the rocket launcher in the 2013 reboot of Shadow Warrior.; The orbiting Demon Head gained through the Shadow Warrior synergy is likely a reference to one of the game's weapons, a demon head that shoots a laser out of its mouth.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Links bullets together with chain lightning. The signature weapon of Alistair, the Thunderbolt. Upon his second descent into the Gungeon, the Thunderbolt famously remarked, "Lightning won't strike here again." He wasn't wrong.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Creates chains of damaging electricity between fired bullets.; Doubles the damage of Beam style Guns.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Alistair's Ladder If the player has Thunderclap, it fires two parallel balls of lightning with every shot, connecting the bullets in a ladder pattern.; Battery Powered If the player has Shock Rifle, the gun's appearance changes and it automatically regenerates ammo over time.

entries.unlock: Defeat Blobulord.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fearsome bounty hunter from beyond the stars. Lives by a code all his own.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Summons Super Space Turtle to the players side to aid them in combat.; Super Space Turtle will run towards enemies, firing bullets that deal 5 damage each.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: The Elephant in the Room If the player has Elephant Gun, it becomes an elephant head and shoots elephants instead of bullets.; Super Space Turtle DX If the player also has Yellow Chamber, Super Space Turtle becomes jammed, firing piercing shots with higher damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The turtle's bullets are affected by bullet modifiers such as Cursed Bullets and Helix Bullets.; Shock Rounds will create a link of electricity between the turtle's bullets and the player's bullets.

entries.unlock: Kill The Hunter's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A faithful companion. Finds items on room clear. Keeps the Hunter company. He has a good nose for treasure, but all attempts to train him in combat have failed.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped when playing as The Hunter.; The dog cannot be interacted with if the player is currently in combat.

entries.unlock: Defeat Blobulord.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fearsome bounty hunter from beyond the stars. Lives by a code all his own.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Summons Super Space Turtle to the players side to aid them in combat.; Super Space Turtle will run towards enemies, firing bullets that deal 5 damage each.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: The Elephant in the Room If the player has Elephant Gun, it becomes an elephant head and shoots elephants instead of bullets.; Super Space Turtle DX If the player also has Yellow Chamber, Super Space Turtle becomes jammed, firing piercing shots with higher damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The turtle's bullets are affected by bullet modifiers such as Cursed Bullets and Helix Bullets.; Shock Rounds will create a link of electricity between the turtle's bullets and the player's bullets.

entries.englishDisplayName: Bullet That Can Kill The Past
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A bullet that can kill the past. You're not sure what will happen when you fire it, but you feel exhilarated!
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Allows a Gungeoneer to access their past with the Gun That Can Kill The Past.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; All rooms that are guaranteed to appear due to the required parts will no longer appear after turning the parts in.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Adds small explosive charges to some shots fired. Originally developed by the Gundead Miners found deep in the Black Powder Mines, these small explosive charges work wonders when clearing a room. A favorite of the Gunsling King, who enjoys the sound they make.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Adds an 8.5% chance to fire bullets that explode upon hitting an enemy or object.; The explosions deal 25 damage.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Air Support If the player has Air Strike, it will cover a massive area when used.; Cerebral Bros Upgrades the Bullet Bore to fire 2 drills.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The explosions do not harm the player.; Explosions can show secret room cracks when using starter guns.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A peculiar piece of armor. The crest of a strange religion. The edges are scuffed and worn, as if it has been slid into a frame several times. The crest depicts a great bullet falling from the sky, surrounded by prostrate Gundead figures.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants a piece of armor.; This piece of armor will always appear at the end of the health bar, and is destroyed upon taking damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cannot be dropped.; Self-damage from Cigarettes will destroy Old Crest.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Use to escape from a sealed room. Another standard adventurer's tool rendered less useful by the Gungeon's mysterious topology. Instead of returning to the surface, this rope will only provide an escape from a single room. Sometimes, though, that's all you need.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, teleports the player into the Shop, resetting the current room if they are in an uncleared combat room.; In the R&G Dept and Bullet Hell, which do not have shops, the player is teleported to the first room of the chamber.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: All Out Of Law If the player has Colt 1851, it fires three tight spreads of three bullets upon reloading. These projectiles can ignore tables when fired from behind them, and they can reveal secret rooms without angering the shopkeeper Bello.; Hydro Pump If the player has Mega Douser, increases the Mega Douser's damage by 50%, triples its shot speed and knockback, and increases the stream's size.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Teleporting out of a boss room will return the boss to full health when the player re-enters.; If the player takes damage to a boss and uses the Escape Rope to teleport out, they cannot earn a Master Round even if they take no damage on subsequent attempts at the boss.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Grants flight while retaining maneuverability. A pair of finely-crafted wax wings.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants flight, giving the player the ability to fly over pits and floor traps such as spikes.; Flight, by extension, grants immunity to all floor goop, since the player is not actually on the floor to touch it.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Peripheral Vision If the player has Light Gun, the Light Gun will turn from red to white and a dog resembling the Duck Hunt dog will appear and slap an enemy when they are shot.; Vulcan Raving If the player also has Vulcan Cannon, its knockback is increased by 50%.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Wax Wings utterly trivialise Winchesters shooting gallery, as the player can fly over the pit and shoot every target at point blank range- all but guaranteeing the highest reward.; This item is a reference to the Greek legend of Icarus, where the craftsman Daedalus made wings out of wax and feathers to escape Crete with his son Icarus. However, as Icarus flew too close too the Sun, the wax melted and he fell into the ocean.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Trorc for 3 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Creates a cluster of proximity mines.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Places 5 small mines that explode when an enemy comes into contact with them, dealing 60 damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Cerebral Bros If the player also has Bullet Bore, the gun shoots an extra drill and turns red.; Mine Craft If the player also has Mine Cutter, mines home in on enemies while Mine Cutter is equipped.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves dodging. This ancient ring spins slowly about its axis, even when worn. It is of unknown origin.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases dodge roll speed by 15.8%.; Increases the amount of time during a dodge roll that the player is invulnerable.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Hot Rolls If the player also has Ring of Fire Resistance, rolling creates a trail of fire.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to a Dark Souls item of the same name.; Like in Enter The Gungeon, dodge rolling in Dark Souls is a commonly used move to avoid enemy attacks.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A pair of enchanted wings, which grant flight. Your caterpillar friend has metamorphosed into a wondrous creature! And that wondrous creature is a spine fly, which burrows into the spinal column of vertebrates. The survivors of this parasite sprout wings.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants flight.; Rolls leave pink slime that temporarily charms enemies.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Granted by Hungry Caterpillar.

entries.unlock: Transport [[Ox and Cadence
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Extra Life. An uncomfortable answer to an uncomfortable truth. This clone can replace a single Gungeoneer upon their death, with almost no lapse in memory.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon death, the player respawns at the very beginning of their run with full health, as well as all of their accumulated guns, items, and pickups- with the exception of Clone itself. This essentially allows the player to immediately start a new run with all of the loot of the last run.; The Robot will always respawn with 6 Armor.
entries.englishUsageNotes: If the shopkeeper has been angered (ex. shooting in shop, stealing), he will not return after revival.; Allows the collection of duplicate Master Rounds on a single run, all of which count towards unlocking the Super Hot Watch.

entries.unlock: "Rescue" the Ledge Goblin multiple times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Reduces hazard radius of explosions. This hardy helmet provides protection when too close to an explosion. Be wary though, it only works at a distance.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Decreases the radius at which explosions can harm the player.; Increases damage dealt by dodge rolling into enemies by 200% (3x multiplier).
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Blast Crown If the player has Crown of Guns, it gains a chance to fire explosives.; Fightsabre Training While Fightsabre is held, an orbital appears that blocks enemy shots.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Advanced Gungeons & Draguns Update, this item did not prevent contact damage or increase dodge roll damage.; This item may be a reference to the training helmet that Luke Skywalker wore in Star Wars.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Professor Goopton for 5 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Emits deadly ooze when damaged. This canister contains a poisonous sample of dangerous monster blood, collected by Médecins Sans Diplôme for study.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Taking damage spawns a pool of poison goop.; Grants immunity to poison.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Deadly Distraction If the player also has Decoy, the Decoy creates a large poison pool when attacked.; Deadlier Distraction If the player also has Explosive Decoy, the Explosive Decoy explodes and creates a large poison pool when attacked.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Like all heart container items, The Robot will receive 5 to 10 coin instead.; On the Switch version, and Windows 10 Steam version, the accented characters in the Ammonomicon entry won't show up, instead reading "Mdecins Sans Diplme".

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 10 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Gain armor when damaged several times. These self-replicating Nanomachines transform lead that enters the body into armor.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Grants 2 pieces of Armor upon pickup.; Grants a piece of Armor every 4 times damage is taken.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Future Gangster If the player also has Thompson Sub-Machinegun, the projectiles are turned into lasers.; Pistol Machine If the player also has Machine Pistol, its bullets will be connected by electricity.
entries.englishUsageNotes: This item is a reference to the character Senator Steven Armstrong, antagonist and final boss of Metal Gear Rising: Revengence, who uses nanomachines within his body to grant himself superhuman resilience.; The Ammonomicon quote "Son" in reference to a quote from one of Armstrong's most famous speeches in the game; "Nanomachines, son!".

entries.unlock: Speak to the Tinker after completing the [[Shortcuts
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Improves dodge roll by adding bullets. A hero from the distant past used these gunboots to descend a mysterious abyss. After many years, like all gun artifacts, they made their way to the Gungeon.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Dodge rolling fires a spread of five bullets backwards, which deal 8 damage each.; Increases by 1 (approximately 14%).
entries.englishUsageNotes: Gunboots has a cooldown of about 2 seconds between bursts of bullets.; Can be used to break targets in Winchester's game.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The handle is shaped like the skull of a rodent. What could it unlock?
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Unlocks the hatch to the Resourceful Rat's Lair.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Gnawed Key will not spawn until you have completed the Bullet That Can Kill The Past.; The Gnawed Key will not be discounted by discount effects (e.g. Smiley's Revolver, Iron Coin).

entries.unlock: Speak to the Tinker after completing the [[Shortcuts
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Companion. Fires upon foes. This robot originally served beverages to the Gundead as they wandered the chambers.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Summons a robotic companion that follows the player.; When an enemy is in range, it prioritizes following the target and periodically fires a rapid burst of 6 bullets at them. Each bullet in the burst deals 5 damage, with the burst having a 4 second cooldown.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Battery Powered If the player has Shock Rifle, it automatically regenerates ammo over time.; Tea For Two If the player has the Teapot, a small red aura will appear around the R2G2, when the player reloads the Teapot. Every enemy in this aura will be ignited.
entries.englishUsageNotes: R2G2's bullets are affected by all bullet modifiers.; R2G2 will not attack Red-Caped Bullet Kin.

entries.unlock: Defeat Gatling Gull 20 times.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Summons Gatling Gull as an ally. Gatling Gull respects martial prowess in Gungeoneers. Spend this ticket to bring in the big guns.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Upon use, spawns a friendly Gatling Gull that periodically fires spreads of bullets and flies off once the room is cleared. He will also block damage dealt to him, so he can be used as a shield.; He will die if he sustains enough damage.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Secret Twin If the player also has Vulcan Cannon, holding Vulcan Cannon while using Ticket will spawn two friendly Gatling Gulls instead of one.; Gatling Gull gains the effects of most bullet modifiers.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks will deal increased damage to enemies. This enchanted amulet is not actually made of gold, but brass from melted bullet casings. Even now, it yearns to shoot at something.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be stunned and dealt 60 damage.; The damage effect of the Gold Ammolet functions by increasing each blank's regular damage radius to 25, and adding 50 damage (to the default 10). This means that if multiple copies of the Gold Ammolet are somehow obtained, they will stack additively, with each copy adding 50 more damage.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Relodestar If the player has Relodestone, after Relodestone's effect ends, all bullets absorbed during its use will be shot out in random directions, dealing damage to enemies.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, the Gold Ammolet increased blank damage to 35, did not grant an extra blank and was an A item.; The nature of this item as not being made of gold but actually brass is a reference to gold plated brass, often used in jewelry in place of actual gold due to it being considerably cheaper.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks send enemies flying. This enchanted amulet is strangely polarized, repelling most objects that draw near. It hums softly in the presence of Blanks.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will be stunned.; Increases the knockback of Blanks by 400% (5x multiplier).
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Relodestar If the player has Relodestone, after Relodestone's effect ends, all bullets absorbed during its use will be shot out in random directions, dealing damage to enemies.; Don't Worry About The Vase If the player has The Kiln, destroying small breakable objects (vases, barrels, etc.) has a small chance to activate a blank effect.
entries.englishUsageNotes: If duplicates of this item are somehow obtained, it further increases the knockback of blanks and grants another blank each floor.; Bug: If a large quantity of duplicates are somehow obtained (e.g. around 7 Lodestone Ammolets), saving and quitting to the next floor and continuing grants the player a far higher quantity of blanks than what the ammolets should give.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 8 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Hitting an enemy has a chance to refire the projectile at a nearby enemy. These bullets are imbued with the white-hot rage of Kaliber herself.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Bullets that hit enemies will bounce off them into a random direction.; Reflected bullets can trigger the same effect.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Needless Acrimony The Rage duration of Table Tech Rage is increased while Shotgun Full of Hate is held.; Angry Bullets role in the synergy is superfluous, as it does not directly synergise with Table Tech Rage, and both Table Tech Rage and Shotgun Full of Hate must already be held for it to have any effect. Despite this, the synergy pop-up will still appear, even if the player only has Angry Bullets and Shotgun Full of Hate, despite it not having any effect.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Beam guns will be deflected at a random angle upon hitting an enemy.; Most explosive weapons will not explode upon contact with an enemy. Because of this, it is advisable to drop Angry Bullets during a fight if you intend on using explosive weapons during that fight.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Blanks have a chance to poison, freeze, and ignite enemies. This enchanted amulet is made of the most valuable metal of all, lead. There is an artificer's engravure on the bottom, but time has rendered it illegible.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: When a Blank is triggered, all enemies within a 25 tile radius of its center point will suffer the following effects;; stun
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Don't Worry About The Vase If the player has The Kiln, destroying small breakable objects (vases, barrels, etc.) has a small chance to activate a blank effect.; Relodestar If the player has Relodestone, after Relodestone's effect ends, all bullets absorbed during its use will be shot out in random directions, dealing damage to enemies.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Ammonomicon quote "What Can Will" is a reference to the phrase "Anything that can go wrong will go wrong.", known colloquially as Murphy's Law.; Bug: If an enemy is frozen while spawning it will remain invulnerable to damage until it has thawed and been allowed to properly finish its spawn animation.

entries.unlock: Enter The Cultist's past.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: Boosts stats when alone. Now that the protagonist is dead, it's time to shine!
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Increases the player's movement speed by 2 (base movement speed is 7) and damage by 41% when their co-op partner is dead. As there is never a co-op partner in singleplayer mode, Number 2 is always active.; Cannot be dropped.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Number 2 was not obtainable in single player until A Farewell to Arms.; If obtained on any other gungeoneers, it will travel with them into the past.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Circumnavigates the room, then explodes. Many years ago, Gungeon mariners used wind to propel their bullets instead of combustion. The trips would take so long to cross a room that the bullets would sometimes mutiny and change course entirely.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires slow moving bullets that accelerate and bounce around the room.; These bullets have a slight homing effect, curving towards enemies.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Black Flag If the player also has Grappling Hook or Serious Cannon, each Corsair shot will periodically fire two bouncing cannonballs perpendicular to itself as it travels.; Swift Sloop If the player also has Sense of Direction, increases Corsair's shot speed by 50%, decreases its charge time by 33%, and decreases its reload time by 20%.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Prior to the Supply Drop Update, the bullets did not curve.; Corsair's bullets cannot be caught by Gunjurers.

stats.value: (normal hit) (bounced hit) (hit then bounced hit) (all three hits rare)

entries.englishGameplaySummary: The Charge Shot is a weapon from Distant Lands. Legend says it was once used by mutant gladiators in rocket-propelled deathmatches to the rocket-propelled death.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Barrage Shot If the player also has Jetpack, charge time is reduced by 25%, reload time is increased by 50%, and shot size is increased.; Prior to the A Farewell to Arms update, Charge Shot's magazine size was 1 and its max ammo was 50.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: A four-barreled shotgun that can be fired all at once. Zilla Industries is famous for crafting bespoke weapons for highly talented gunslingers. This shotgun was created with only one concept in mind: maximum destructive potential.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Iron Stance If the player also has Heavy Boots, the gun's damage and knockback are increased by 20%, its shot speed is increased by 50%, and its reload time is decreased by 20%.; Shadow Warrior If the player also has Yari Launcher, when either gun is held, the player gains an orbiting Demon Head that fires on reload. Reduces the guns' spread by 60%, increasing their accuracy.
entries.englishUsageNotes: The Zilla Shotgun is in the SHOTGUN gun class, and as such benefits from the Shotgun Affinity synergy.; Prior to the Supply Drop Update, Zilla Shotgun had 100 maximum ammo.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Fires linked projectiles. This gun fires powerful electron bursts that imitate ancient spells of chained lightning.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Starburst Fire If the player also has Laser Rifle, firing either The Emperor or Laser Rifle once will cause it to rapidly fire its entire magazine. Increases damage by 20% and doubles fire rate.; You can cancel the effect by reloading or dodge-rolling while firing.

entries.unlock: Purchase from Ox and Cadence for 6 HC.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: This immense beam cannon was developed as part of a bid to win the Hegemony's military contracts. The steady stream of intense science energy it fires is a true testament to what physics and engineering can accomplish.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Fires a laser beam with a 0.6s charge-up.; If this laser beam is focused on the same enemy for over 0.5s, it has a 60%~ chance per second to apply each of the following status effects;
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Weird Science If the player also has Disintegrator, three Science Cannon beams branch off perpendicular to the Disintegrator's main beam.; The Return If the player also has Pig, it turns green to resemble Cannon and fires flaming bats.

entries.englishGameplaySummary: Charge to fire bombs. A forgetful adventurer left a pouch full of bombs deep in the Gungeon, and they eventually sprouted into this amusing weapon. A favorite of the Gunsling King, who often sends Manservantes to pick up the bombs.
entries.englishEffectHighlights: Charges up to fire bouncing, exploding bombs. Like most explosive weapons, this explosion is capable of destroying some enemy bullets.; These bombs are uniquely capable of blasting open secret rooms.
entries.englishSynergyHighlights: Bomberpal If the player has Bomb, Lil' Bomber fires two bombs instead of one, charges twice as fast, and has 40% lower reload time.; King Bomber If the player has Gilded Bullets, Coin Crown, or Crown of Guns, its bombs become gold and spawn 0-7 coin upon hitting an enemy.
entries.englishUsageNotes: Bomberpal and Super Bomberpal stack, allowing Lil' Bomber to fire three bombs at once if the player has both Bomb and Ice Bomb.; The King Bomber synergy can provide up to 420 coin per ammo pickup, or up to 840 coin with Loot Bag.

entries.unlock: Create 10 guns using any Muncher.
entries.englishGameplaySummary: A horrific consequence of radiation exposure. At least the arm is still somewhat useful.
